About This Place
Welcome to the world of
Pho Hoang Long
, a gem located in Marietta, Georgia. Nestled at
371 Pat Mell Rd SE Suite #133
, this bustling restaurant has quickly become a beloved spot for both locals and visitors seeking an authentic Vietnamese dining experience.
From the moment you step inside, the aroma of rich broths and spices envelops you, beckoning you to indulge in their diverse menu. Each dish shines with flavor and showcases the culinary prowess of the chefs here. Whether you're a seasoned pho enthusiast or a newcomer, Pho Hoang Long caters to every palate with dishes like their
Tom Yum Goong
, a delightfully spicy shrimp soup, and the comforting
Tom Kha Gai
, a symphony of tender chicken and coconut milk.
The star of the show is undoubtedly their pho. As echoed in the enthusiastic reviews from satisfied patrons, the
beef pho
and
shrimp pho
have garnered rave reviews for their aromatic broth—light yet packed with depth. Many diners, from seasoned travelers to local food lovers, consistently rank Pho Hoang Long among the top Vietnamese spots in the country, noting the exceptional quality of the ingredients, the tenderness of the meat, and the generous portion sizes.
But it’s not just the food that makes this restaurant stand out. Customers rave about the
incredible service
. The staff here are known for their warmth, patience, and willingness to accommodate even the pickiest of requests. A glance around the restaurant reveals a steady stream of diners—both in-house and takeout—indicating that Pho Hoang Long is a cherished destination.
As you explore their menu, don’t miss out on the
Thai Fish Cakes
and
Chicken Satay
, both of which serve as perfect appetizers to tantalize your taste buds before delving into hearty bowls of pho. The Thai shrimp rolls and vermicelli noodle dishes are also crowd-pleasers, making for a well-rounded meal.
In summary, Pho Hoang Long is more than just a restaurant; it's a celebration of Vietnamese cuisine and culture. With each bite, you can taste the passion and dedication that goes into crafting every dish. Whether you’re stopping by for a quick lunch or a leisurely dinner, this spot promises to leave you feeling satisfied and eager to return.
For those interested, you can call them at
+1 770-384-0530
to inquire about their menu or check for takeout options. The journey to your next favorite pho experience begins here!

What Guests Are Saying
(1088)
Nancy Tassin
08/12/2025
OMG — I absolutely love this place! I’m still new to ordering pho, and the shrimp pho has become my favorite. Every time I visit, the staff is incredibly kind and patient with my (very) picky requests — always with a smile. Truly one of my favorite spots. Love, love, love this place!
Useful
Funny
GD H
17/11/2025
As with other reviews I mention I travel a lot for work. All over the country. I've eaten pho in at least 23 states. I would put this in the top 5 out of probably 100 plus vietnamese restaurants I have been. Too the staff was very nice. The food was great. I had the egg rolls and beef pho and the broth was great. That's always the trick.
Useful
Funny
Lauren Hottie
09/11/2025
This Pho restaurant is well loved, I can tell it’s been around a long time. It was packed and people were coming in the whole time we were dining to get pick up orders and rightfully so. The veggie pho and tofu rolls were good. The customer service was great.
Useful
Funny
Jim Cyganek
16/10/2025
I had a late lunch here. Please note that they usually restrict orders to takeout between lunch and dinner, but I was allowed to eat in. The Pho was wonderful. The dining room was clean. The service was prompt and pleasant. My water glass never was less than 3/4 full
Useful
Funny
Seer
11/09/2025
So glad I decided to stop here on a whim. Some of the best pho I’ve ever had! The broth is light and packed with flavor, and the meat was tender and delicious. The portion sizes are pretty big, and very reasonably priced as well. Will definitely be coming back!
Useful
Funny
Tameka Navarro
03/09/2025
First place Im going to eat when I get back to GA. Haven't found a better Pho place yet! Ambiance and great taste this place it the best!
Useful
Funny
Michael Bennett
30/08/2025
Do not let the looks of the place fool you. Behind thses doors hides a culinary gem. Delicious fresh items. Huge plates and bowls. What they lack in fancy they make up for in flavor and fullness. You will be pleasantly surprised.
Useful
Funny
Daniel Berke
22/08/2025
Really awesome both times. Have tried a variety of phos now and the meatballs and egg rolls and all have been great!! Reminds me of the OG Vietnamese places on Buford Highway, including the very reasonable prices (hint: if you call them or order there, instead of doing through the default doordash etc which comes up online, you'll get the good price!) Service has been super friendly too even when I took my insane toddlers.
Useful
Funny

Reviews
At
Pho Hoang Long
, located in Marietta, Georgia, the menu is a delightful journey through authentic Vietnamese cuisine. The star attraction is, undoubtedly, their phở, with options like the
P6. Phở Tái Gầu
featuring rare steak and brisket, and
P7. Phở Tái Sách
with tripe, both served in a light, flavorful broth that has garnered praise from repeat customers.
But the menu doesn’t stop there. Dive into the vibrant
Thai soups
such as the
Tom Yum Goong
, a spicy shrimp delight, or the creamy
Tom Kha Gai
chicken soup. For those craving rice plates, the selection includes grilled chicken and an irresistible combo fried rice that boasts a mix of meats and seafood.
With generous portions and friendly service, Pho Hoang Long creates a welcoming atmosphere where each dish is crafted with love. It's no wonder this spot has captured the hearts of locals and visitors alike.

meta.meta_description: Discover Pho Hoang Long, a local favorite in Marietta, GA, offering authentic Vietnamese dishes like flavorful pho, delicious vermicelli noodles, and refreshing milk teas. Enjoy exceptional service and a cozy atmosphere perfect for dining in or takeout. J
